summary: Font size preference reset after upgrade from v4.1.x to v4.2.0
description:
After upgrading the NBT app from v4.1.x to v4.2.0 (released 28 April 2026), the saved font-size preference (छोटा / मध्यम / बड़ा / बहुत बड़ा) resets to the default (मध्यम). Users who had set बड़ा or बहुत बड़ा perceive the entire app as suddenly downsizing all text.

Fix: migrate v4.1 SharedPreferences key to the new v4.2 datastore key during first launch after upgrade. Queued for v4.3.
